creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text: Patch now attached. I did not initially attach the patch specifically because I wanted to see what Bugzilla would do with it when it's part of the text. Listing all the attachments together before description and comments is downright awful UI. Gnats could show patches nicely formatted inline with the relevant reply, allowing them to be easily read in context. Bugzilla is apparently incapable of such.
